== Notes for [[Item:Q99562|Q99562]] ==

According to Zev Golan, Hanemel was sold as a slave. He accepted the leadership of Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) and became Prophet Muhammad's top Wazir named Solomon al-Farsi.

Solomon al-Farsi led an army of Jews + Arabs against Byzantium in what is know today as the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan.

Bibliography:

Publisher: Yair Publications (November 1, 2011) Language: English ISBN-10: 9659172400 ISBN-13: 978-9659172405

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD7C18571EFBBFA9822EF79916CD743
geni:6000000017208754828

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
